title: Human Development Index groups
subtitle: The Human Development Index (HDI) is a summary measure of key dimensions of human development: a long and healthy life, a good education, and a decent standard of living. The groups below define different levels of human development depending on the HDI values.
caption:
Human Development Index groups

The Human Development Index (HDI) is a summary measure of key dimensions of human development: a long and healthy life, a good education, and a decent standard of living. The groups below define different levels of human development depending on the HDI values.

This choropleth map displays the global distribution of countries categorized into four Human Development Index groups for the year 2023. The visualization uses a color scale to distinguish between Low (red), Medium (yellow), High (light blue), and Very high (dark blue) development levels, alongside a hatched pattern for regions with no data. The highest category, Very high, covers the majority of North America, including the United States and Canada, as well as most of Western and Northern Europe, Australia, New Zealand, Japan, and South Korea. The High category includes nations such as Russia, China, Brazil, and Argentina, forming a band across parts of Eastern Europe, Latin America, and East Asia. The Medium category is prominent across North Africa, the Middle East including Saudi Arabia, and parts of South and Southeast Asia like India and Indonesia. The Low category is concentrated primarily in sub-Saharan Africa, with countries such as Niger, Chad, and the Central African Republic falling into this group. Greenland is marked with the hatched pattern indicating no data. The geographic arrangement shows a distinct concentration of the Very high group in the northern hemisphere's temperate zones and Oceania, while the Low group is clustered in the central African region. The map presents a clear spatial gradient where development levels transition from Very high in the north and west to Low in central Africa and parts of South Asia.
